production_assistant.technical_quality_notes: Voice is slightly strained due to a cold, but clear. Background music is well-balanced. Some mouse clicking is audible during building.

refinements.original: Stamina bar of only 50 points is not something I'm used to.
refinements.correction: My old lungs don't have the wind they used to; I've got to pace myself.

refinements.original: Rested buff is crucial. It affects how fast your stamina regens.
refinements.correction: A man's got to keep his spirits high. A warm fire and a roof make the next day's work feel lighter.

strategic_analyst.safety_protocol_notes: Early game survival was prioritized. Shelter was built just as night fell. Avoided poison bees in the abandoned structure.
highlight_gold: 14:52 - Explaining the fine wood trick with falling logs
28:22 - Successfully sleeping through the first night
strategic_analyst.strategic_growth_goal: Transition from explaining 'game mechanics' to telling the 'story of survival' to better align with the Grandpa Bud brand.
